source_feedback: User confirmed SC001 assets are complete and asked to add a battlefield push-pull wide shot with voiceover.
User requested replacing Xue Linqiang's battlefield line with a shorter battlefield warning and asked the script to clarify the required tone.
User updated R001/R002 image files and requested SC001-SH001 duration be changed to 3.5s / 84 frames.

prompt_changes.change: Updated prompt intent from impact detail to battlefield wide push-pull using R001/R002 FLF2V references.
Updated dialogue reference to '敌人上来了。' and clarified the required tone as low, urgent but controlled in script and prompt metadata.

Reframed lighting as the battlefield-wide variant: maximum environmental depth, cold sky light silhouetting the black wall, multiple distant firelines, volumetric snow-smoke layers and the largest shadow area.
Adjusted camera endpoint from pullback to the bone bell to pullback to the city wall and wall-top defense line, keeping the bell as a wall anchor.

Updated the shooting scheme from frontal push-pull to a diagonal siege-side lift: R001 should become a low diagonal rear-side siege first frame, and R002 should become a wall-top medium-near last frame with bone bell, defenders and exterior siege visible below.

Reframed lighting as the bodily-cost close-shot variant: narrowed sources, cold snow bounce into bell cracks, black-wall negative fill over the figure and only weak warm fire rim on blood, fingers and bell cracks.

Reframed lighting as the battlefield-command close-medium variant: half-face black-wall negative fill, small low warm fire edge on face, hand and old armor, and snow haze separating spear line and gate line without heroic backlight.
Marked R001/R002 as visually checked updated first/last frames for the diagonal siege-side lift.
Rewrote beast troop and companion-beast inheritance from prompt-only file-name references to explicit ComfyUI image-node binding requirements for C020, C021, and E01_C020.
Added low-weight background beast reference binding so exterior beast troops remain visually continuous without overpowering the young soldier I2V frame.
Added low-weight background beast reference binding so exterior beast troops remain visually continuous without overpowering Xue Linqiang identity reference.

unresolved_issues: No ComfyUI render feedback exists for the current remade episode 01 package.
SC001 E01_R001-E01_R004 reference frame files exist at 3840x2160 and are synchronized as generated_candidate_pending_user_qc; user visual QC is still required before final approval.
Model checkpoint, LoRA, ControlNet, IPAdapter preset, workflow template and workflow node IDs are not configured.
The production workflow must provide image input nodes for C020/c020m.png, C021/c021m.png, and E01_C020/c020e01.png; prompt text alone cannot make ComfyUI read these references.

source_feedback: User reported the generated SH001 video moved behind the wall without the intended turn, faced the other side of the wall, and made the wall read as a horizontal wall attacked from both sides.
User asked how to add character modeling/reference nodes into the FLF2V workflow.

prompt_changes.change: Strengthened camera direction language: the camera climbs along the same exterior wall face and lands on the exterior-edge wall top while still facing the same exterior siege side.

Added explicit negatives against crossing over the wall crown, looking at the opposite side, showing both sides of the wall under attack, making rear-wall thickness the main subject, or placing beast attackers inside the wall.
Added low-weight character reference guidance for tail-frame wall defenders using E01_C024A, with optional E01_C004 only if Xue Linqiang is actually visible in the SH001 tail frame.

parameter_changes.new_value: E01_C024A at weight 0.25-0.30 from 55% to 100%; optional E01_C004 at weight 0.20-0.25 from 65% to 100% only if visible in tail frame
small yaw along the parapet while still facing the same exterior siege side; no rear/opposite-side reveal

unresolved_issues: Need a new SH001 FLF2V test render to verify the same-side exterior wall lock.
If the model still crosses to the opposite side, reduce camera motion strength or regenerate R002 with a stronger same-side exterior downward view through merlons.

source_feedback: User rejected the young soldier bracing the bell and requested that he be knocked by the impact, half-collapsed beside the wall, with the weapon slipping from his hand and the bell swinging beside him.
User reported the image lacked refined cinematic lighting and felt muddy, dark and grey, referencing a shot with clear low sun, rim light and tonal separation.

prompt_changes.change: Dropped the complex wall-top turn and rewrote the shot as an exterior front-biased low push to the first gate impact and gatehouse bell sound, with visible bell no longer required in SH001, reducing direction drift risk.
Replaced the bell-bracing pose with an aftershock body-cost beat: young soldier half-collapsed beside the parapet, weapon dropped into snow mud, same bone bell swinging beside him.

Added cinematic highlight hierarchy: cold-white gate-impact snow haze as brightest zone, pale-gold/cold-white storm-break rim on wall/siege engine/beasts/gate, low dark-red fire edge, black-wall negative fill.

Added close-shot lighting hierarchy: storm-break rim on bell frame, chains, helmet, shoulder armor and dropped weapon; gate-impact snow bounce as highlight center; dark-red fire edge only on fingers, weapon, bell rim and frozen blood.

parameter_changes.new_value: needs regeneration as half-collapsed-by-impact, dropped weapon, same bell swinging
same exterior direction low push to gate impact; no 90-degree turn, no rear/opposite-side reveal

unresolved_issues: Regenerate r003e01.png from the updated image prompt before final SC001-SH002 I2V render.
Run a small ComfyUI render test to confirm the image no longer reads muddy, dark and uniformly grey, and that the shot has a clear highlight center and key-light direction.

source_feedback: User asked whether episode 01 SC003 storyboard explanation, camera movement, prompts and per-frame composition were complete, and requested completion with stronger lighting and image quality/texture.

prompt_changes.change: Completed tabletop red-line map composition, oil-lamp/rain bounce lighting and bilingual prompt blocks.
Completed Gu/Yan table divide, warm lamp versus cool jade lighting, face-reveal control and bilingual prompt blocks.
Completed genealogy hand insert centered on the untouched gap, low oil-lamp paper texture, cool jade edge and bilingual prompt blocks.
Completed red-line-to-checkpoint FLF2V transition, dim oil lamp to insect-wax blockade lighting and bilingual prompt blocks.

parameter_changes.new_value: r010e01.png prompt complete, canonical PNG missing
FLF2V with r013/r014 prompt-complete missing first/last frames

unresolved_issues: Generate and visually QC r010e01.png through r014e01.png before formal SC003 I2V/FLF2V rendering.

source_feedback: User clarified to judge only the first-shot tail frame; the supplied two images are for later shots.
User asked to preserve current R001/R002 style: both outside facing the wall, centered symmetrical epic establishing shot, one wall and one gate.
User clarified that the bone bell / same bell frame does not need to appear in SC001-SH001; only gatehouse bell sound is needed, with the bell inside the gatehouse.
User requested R002 tail-frame modification: closer to the gate, stronger impact, while preserving the current texture and realism.

prompt_changes.change: Approved R001/R002 current centered exterior epic siege style as the hard visual direction: same exterior attack side, one blackstone wall, one gate, centered symmetry allowed.
Removed visible bone bell / same bell frame as a first-shot visual hard requirement; the bell is inside the gatehouse and exists as audio only in SH001.
Updated R002 requirement to closer gate endpoint and stronger first impact with cold-white snow haze, ice splinters, old timber chips, gate-bar shock and blackstone edge reflection.

parameter_changes.old_value: same-exterior gate-impact endpoint with visible bell implied under the superseded rule
parameter_changes.new_value: R001 approved as current centered exterior epic texture standard; canonical R002 replaced with 4096x2304 closer gate, stronger impact and P017 Suming flags; visible bell not required

parameter_changes.old_value: exterior front-biased / diagonal wording with visible bell-frame endpoint risk
parameter_changes.new_value: same exterior centered low push to closer gate impact; gatehouse bell sound only; no rear/opposite-side reveal
